query: Use datocms-setup-blueprint-sync to configure one blueprint profile and two destination profiles that share the same migrations directory.
Please invoke datocms-setup-blueprint-sync in this repo. I want CLI profiles for blueprint, client_a, and client_b plus a helper to run the same migrations across them.
Run datocms-setup-blueprint-sync and add the optional GitHub Actions workflow for syncing multiple DatoCMS projects.
How do I configure multiple DatoCMS CLI profiles in datocms.config.json and run migrations for each one?
Use datocms-setup-migration-release-workflow so I can promote one migrated sandbox to primary.
Set up GraphQL type generation for DatoCMS queries using gql.tada.
